title: Independence task force
content:
{{Top|leg|title=''Independence'' task force}}
[[File:Fleet_massing_near_Sullust_XWA.png|thumb|right|250px|Imperial starships approaching the ''Independence'' task force during the [[Battle of Sullust (4 ABY)|Battle of Sullust]].]]
The '''''Independence'' task force''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] unit under the command of the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] [[Independence/Legends|''Independence'']].

The task force was accompanying the ''Independence'' before the mustering of [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]] and were [[Battle of Sullust (4 ABY)|attacked]] by the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Immortal/Legends|Immortal]]'' and two [[Victory II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory II''-class Star Destroyers]], [[Protector (Victory II-class)|''Protector'']] and [[Vanguard (Victory II-class)|''Vanguard'']].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
